name: Important Things They Don't Teach You at School
original_name: 学校では教えてくれない大切なこと
overview: Unique and reliable "experts" appear before elementary school students who are struggling with issues such as "I'm not good at tidying up," "I keep putting off my homework because I'm so obsessed with games," and "My grades aren't improving as much as I'd like," and provide passionate instruction to teach them important things that they should learn but that they won't learn at school.

trailers.title: アニメ『学校では教えてくれない大切なこと』整理整頓編ティザーPV【7月5日　テレビ東京・イニミニマニモ内で放送開始！】
